title: PCP Offical Modpack 2024
description:
Featured Modpack on the PurpleCraft Productions SMP.
An Optimization + Create Modpack.
body:
This is the _official_ modpack for the PCP 2024 Season. If you would like to play along with us please join along.

It is featured on YouTube channels such as [Negative_light](https://www.youtube.com/@Negative_Light).

If you would like to follow along and join in the fun then this modpack is the place to start.


# Included Mods

| ---: | :--- | :--- |
